title: andropogon gerardi subsp. chrysocomus
intro: Andropogon gerardi subsp. chrysocomus, commonly known as Big Bluestem, is a perennial grass species native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Andropogon gerardi subsp. chrysocomus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a natural diuretic, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health issues. Andropogon gerardi subsp. chrysocomus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk medicine as a poultice or compress to apply topical relief.
